name: study-server
description: Self-hosted HTTP backend that generates study summaries, flashcards, quiz questions, and answer grading via any OpenAI-compatible local LLM server (llama.cpp, Ollama, etc.), with auto-discovery across multiple endpoints. Designed to pair with the obsidian-speed-reading and obsidian-study-quiz plugins, but usable from any client.
author: Luis Reinoso
